title: CUSAT Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 03 Assistant Professor Posts
description: Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT) has released the official notification for 2026. To fill up the 03 Vacancies for Assistant Professor Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the MBA Ph.D can grab this chance and apply for the CUSAT Notification 2026 . Here we included more information about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
